AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,241.75 FILED BY YU, WU AS TO DEFENDANT THAVIDU, RANATUNGA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YU, WU

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. PLAINTIFF WU YU APPEARS AT THE 1:30 P.M HEARING TO REQUEST THAT HIS MATTER SET FOR 3:30 P.M. BE DISMISSED IN OPEN COURT PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE CLERK THAT HIS MATTER HAS SETTLED AND HE WISHES TO DISMISS HIS CASE WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT A SETTLEMENT IS REACHED.
